calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David J. Foran, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Douglass Lee.
Bernard Stalder, Agent for Plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Daniel Mariam.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 6, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, September 8, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Lease Agreemen dated July 11, 2008--------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Douglas Lee, and against defendant Daniel Mariam as follows:

Damages/Principal - $14,300.00.
Attorney's Fees & Costs - Pursuant to Memorandum of Costs to be submitted to the Court.
Total - $14,300.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Set For Trial On Aug-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
